traps.name: Pit Trap
traps.description: A concealed ten-foot pit opens beneath the creature's feet, its lid hinged on rusted pins that give way with a groan.

traps.name: Poison Dart
traps.description: A tiny dart fires from a hole no wider than a quill, its tip glistening with a greenish residue that numbs on contact.

traps.name: Tripwire Alarm
traps.description: A thin cord stretched ankle-height rings a cluster of bells or triggers a magic mouth, alerting every creature within 300 feet.

traps.name: Net Trap
traps.description: A weighted net drops from the ceiling, pinning the creature beneath cords reinforced with barbed wire. Escape requires a DC 12 Strength check.

traps.name: Falling Block
traps.description: A slab of dressed stone drops from a slot in the ceiling, cracking the floor where it lands. Dust and gravel shower the passage.

traps.name: Swinging Blade
traps.description: A scythe-like blade swings from a concealed slot in the wall, its edge still sharp despite centuries of disuse.

traps.name: Poison Needle Lock
traps.description: A spring-loaded needle hidden in a lock or latch pricks the finger of anyone who fails to find and disable it first.

traps.name: Hunting Trap
traps.description: A steel-jawed bear trap concealed beneath leaves or loose stone. Its teeth lock around the ankle, and escape without tools risks tearing the wound wider.

traps.name: Spiked Pit
traps.description: A deeper pit than its simpler cousin, lined at the bottom with sharpened wooden stakes that have been hardened in fire.

traps.name: Fire Jet
traps.description: A gout of alchemist's fire erupts from a nozzle concealed in the wall, filling a five-foot corridor with searing flame that clings to armor.

traps.name: Glyph of Warding
traps.description: Arcane sigils etched into the floor or door frame flare white-hot when a creature not bearing the correct ward passes over them.

traps.name: Collapsing Ceiling
traps.description: Load-bearing stones have been weakened and rigged to a trigger. The ceiling comes down in a cascade of rubble, filling the area with choking dust.

traps.name: Flooding Room
traps.description: Opening the wrong door unseals a reservoir. Water thunders in, filling the sealed chamber to the ceiling in six rounds.

traps.name: Crossbow Trap
traps.description: A heavy crossbow mounted in an alcove fires when a wire is disturbed. The bolt punches through shield wood and lodges in stone.

traps.name: Spring-Loaded Spears
traps.description: A row of iron-tipped spears rams upward through the floor with enough force to lift an armored knight off their feet.

traps.name: Acid Splash Vial
traps.description: A clay pot of concentrated acid swings down from the ceiling on a weighted arm, shattering against the first creature it strikes.

traps.name: Lightning Glyph
traps.description: A rune inscribed on the threshold arcs a bolt of lightning between the doorframe's metal fittings when a creature passes through.

traps.name: Poison Gas Room
traps.description: Nozzles hidden in the walls begin hissing a yellowish vapor when the door seals. The gas is heavier than air and pools at floor level.

traps.name: Sphere of Annihilation Trap
traps.description: A two-foot void of absolute darkness hangs in a corridor, pulling at loose objects. Anything it touches ceases to exist entirely.

traps.name: Reverse Gravity Trap
traps.description: Gravity inverts in a sixty-foot column. Creatures fall upward, strike the ceiling, then fall again when the effect ends ten seconds later.

traps.name: Wall of Force Cage
traps.description: Invisible walls of force snap into place, sealing a creature in a ten-foot cube. A secondary mechanism activates while they are trapped.

traps.name: Disintegration Beam
traps.description: A crystal lens mounted in the wall focuses a thin green ray at chest height. What it strikes does not burn -- it simply stops existing.

traps.name: Teleportation Trap
traps.description: A sigil on the floor flares blue, and the creature is elsewhere -- separated from allies, deposited in a locked cell or the lair of something hungry.

traps.name: Flame Skull Sentry
traps.description: A flameskull orbits a pillar, launching fireballs at intruders. It reforms one hour after destruction unless its remains are doused in holy water.

traps.name: Necrotic Sigil
traps.description: A rune carved into a sarcophagus lid or treasure chest that channels negative energy into the hand that touches it, withering flesh to the bone.

traps.name: Blade Barrier Hallway
traps.description: A curtain of spinning blades fills a ten-foot section of corridor, whirling with enough speed to reduce a shield to kindling.

traps.name: Symbol of Death
traps.description: A glyph inscribed by an archmage that detonates when a creature comes within sixty feet, flooding the area with soul-rending energy.

traps.name: Prismatic Wall Trap
traps.description: A shimmering wall of seven colors springs into existence across a corridor. Each layer inflicts a different catastrophe -- fire, acid, lightning, poison, petrification, madness, or banishment.

traps.name: Anti-Magic Field Trap
traps.description: A permanent antimagic field fills a chamber, suppressing all magic within. Enchanted items go dark, summoned creatures vanish, and the real trap activates while the party is powerless.

traps.name: Soul Trap
traps.description: A gem or mirror imprisons the soul of any creature that touches it. The body falls lifeless, and the soul can only be freed by shattering the vessel or casting wish.

traps.name: Maze Trap
traps.description: The creature is shunted into an extradimensional labyrinth. Escape requires a DC 20 Intelligence check each round, and failure means another minute lost in featureless corridors.

traps.name: Petrification Gaze Trap
traps.description: A mounted medusa head enchanted with permanent magic turns its stone gaze on any creature that enters its line of sight. The effect is gradual -- stiffness first, then stillness.

traps.name: Collapsing Corridor
traps.description: A sixty-foot section of tunnel has been undermined. Triggering the plate starts a cascade that collapses the passage in three rounds, burying everything beneath.
